Free audit today

Get a free AI automation audit before choosing any agent.

Share your lead flow, tools, response time, and growth goal. AI SDR will create an on-screen report with analytics, ROI direction, recommended agents, and a practical roadmap. A PDF copy is emailed automatically.

agent catalogue

50 business AI agents, shown in a premium coding-theme marketplace.

Search traffic can land on any agent, industry, or use case. Verified users can select an agent or describe a custom one.

Lead GenerationEmail AutomationLinkedIn AutomationInstagram AutomationSocial Media AutomationSEO Automation
Lead Generation#01

AI Lead Generation Agent

Finds qualified prospects by industry, region, role, and buying intent.

business_value

AI Lead Generation Agent is built to finds qualified prospects by industry, region, role, and buying intent. Instead of waiting for a person to remember the next step, it turns the process into a measurable workflow: collect market signals -> score prospects -> prepare outreach.

solves

Collect market signals is still handled manually or inconsistently., Score prospects depends on memory, spreadsheets, or scattered notes.

input::collect market signals
analyze::score prospects
output::prepare outreach
View full agent page
Lead Generation#02

AI Client Acquisition Agent

Runs qualification, follow-ups, lead scoring, and sales pipeline movement.

business_value

AI Client Acquisition Agent is built to runs qualification, follow-ups, lead scoring, and sales pipeline movement. Instead of waiting for a person to remember the next step, it turns the process into a measurable workflow: capture lead -> analyze fit -> trigger follow-up.

solves

Capture lead is still handled manually or inconsistently., Analyze fit depends on memory, spreadsheets, or scattered notes.

input::capture lead
analyze::analyze fit
output::trigger follow-up
View full agent page

AI Cold Email Agent

Creates personalized outbound emails and response-aware sequences.

business_value

AI Cold Email Agent is built to creates personalized outbound emails and response-aware sequences. Instead of waiting for a person to remember the next step, it turns the process into a measurable workflow: research lead -> draft email -> track reply.

solves

Research lead is still handled manually or inconsistently., Draft email depends on memory, spreadsheets, or scattered notes.

input::research lead
analyze::draft email
output::track reply

Lead Generation#04

AI Follow-Up Agent

Sends timely follow-ups based on lead status, interest, and replies.

business_value

AI Follow-Up Agent is built to sends timely follow-ups based on lead status, interest, and replies. Instead of waiting for a person to remember the next step, it turns the process into a measurable workflow: detect stage -> draft next touch -> schedule send.

solves

Detect stage is still handled manually or inconsistently., Draft next touch depends on memory, spreadsheets, or scattered notes.

input::detect stage
analyze::draft next touch
output::schedule send

solves

Open all 50 agents

custom workflow

Do not see your exact agent? Describe it and enter the same AI SDR journey.

Agent selection is optional. A verified visitor can explain their industry, problem, workflow, and expected outcome. The enquiry is stored as a custom agent request in your admin dashboard.

Business Automation#50

AI Custom Business Automation Agent

Designs custom AI workflows for business processes not listed in the catalogue.

business_value

AI Custom Business Automation Agent is built to designs custom ai workflows for business processes not listed in the catalogue. Instead of waiting for a person to remember the next step, it turns the process into a measurable workflow: study workflow -> design agent -> build automation.

solves

Study workflow is still handled manually or inconsistently., Design agent depends on memory, spreadsheets, or scattered notes.

input::study workflow
analyze::design agent
output::build automation

AI SDR workflow

From idea to your own revenue-focused AI agent.

01

Explore agents or get a free audit

02

Tell us your industry, niche, and business goal

03

Book a call and finalize your custom workflow

04

Get your AI agent created and aim for 70% more revenue from better follow-up

About the builder

Built by Anuragini Pathak, focused on practical AI automation.

InstagramLinkedIn

This platform is being built around practical business workflows: sales follow-up, email systems, lead qualification, dashboards, AI analysis, CRM records, and custom automation. The goal is not to add AI because it sounds impressive. The goal is to reduce missed leads, slow replies, manual tracking, and scattered tools.

The work combines hands-on technical building with a clear understanding of how businesses actually lose opportunities. Every agent should either save time, improve visibility, increase follow-up quality, or help a team convert more enquiries into real conversations.

Privacy-first by design.

GDPR-style consent records

Prepared for region-aware handling of profiles, audits, enquiries, and marketing email preferences.

Email unsubscribe for marketing

Prepared for region-aware handling of profiles, audits, enquiries, and marketing email preferences.

India DPDP consent purpose

Prepared for region-aware handling of profiles, audits, enquiries, and marketing email preferences.

Data access and deletion requests

Prepared for region-aware handling of profiles, audits, enquiries, and marketing email preferences.
